name: Knotwork Bridge
description: Connect an OpenClaw agent to a Knotwork workspace via ed25519 auth and inbox polling.
author: Knotwork

knotworkBackendUrl.description: Knotwork server base URL reachable from the OpenClaw runtime (e.g. http://host.docker.internal:8000).

privateKeyPath.description: Absolute path to the ed25519 private key PEM file used to authenticate this agent.

pluginInstanceId.description: Stable identifier for this agent instance. Auto-generated if omitted.

autoAuthOnStart.description: Authenticate on startup if no valid JWT is cached.

semanticActionProtocolEnabled.description: Enable the semantic action-protocol layer for agent thinking and structured action dispatch.

semanticActionStrictMode.description: Require a valid json-action response when semantic action-protocol mode is enabled. If false, fall back to legacy behavior on semantic failures.
